dash.overview: Here is an overview of your farm's AI insights today.
dash.card.crop_desc: Discover the best crop for your soil and weather.
dash.card.disease_desc: Scan a leaf image to instantly detect plant diseases.
dash.card.yield_desc: Forecast your crop harvest output based on inputs.
dash.card.fertilizer_desc: Get exact nutrient dosages to optimize soil health.
dash.card.history_desc: View past predictions and analysis reports.
form.title: Soil & Environment Data Entry
form.subtitle: Enter the precise readings from your farm to receive an accurate crop recommendation.
form.n_desc: Ratio of Nitrogen content in soil
form.p_desc: Ratio of Phosphorous content in soil
form.k_desc: Ratio of Potassium content in soil
res.title: AI Recommendation Result
res.subtitle: Based on your soil and weather data, here is our expert recommendation.
dis.title: Diagnose Plant Diseases with AI
dis.subtitle: Upload a clear photo of a plant leaf to instantly identify diseases and receive expert treatment plans.
dis.drag: Drag and drop a leaf image here
dis.browse: or click to browse from your device
dis.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is an AI-generated diagnosis. While highly accurate, always consult with a local agricultural extension office before applying strong chemical treatments.

yld.subtitle: Estimate your harvest output based on farm area, weather, and inputs.
